items.title: Lectric’s XP4 and XP Lite2 folding e-bikes come with up to $380 in FREE cargo packages starting from $999
items.summary:
Looking back in on Lectric’s current Nothin’ But Net Sale, we wanted to shine a spotlight on the two best utility e-bike packages during this event while the savings last. The first of these is on the popular Lectric XP4 750 Long-Range Folding Utility e-bikes with $360 in FREE gear at $1,299 shipped, while folks looking for a lighter-weight option can find the XP Lite2 Long-Range e-bikes getting $380 in FREE gear at $999 shipped – plus, don’t forget the upgraded XP Lite2 JW Long-Range Belt-Drive e-bike at $1,099 shipped. These bundles would normally run you $1,659 in full on the XP4s, while the XP Lite2 models would run you $1,379 and $1,479. All these models are getting the brand’s cargo package (steel-encased front & rear baskets) alongside a cargo net, as well as the appropriate rear cargo racks, and either an accordion-style bike lock (XP4) or a fender set (XP Lite2). Head below to learn about these two particular e-bikes that are some of my most-often recommended commuting solutions from this brand, as well as shop from the full lineup of deals – including their less-expensive standard variants.

items.title: Score Baseus’ 140W 5-in-1 Qi2 MagSafe desktop charger with cable for $50, or with a FREE 3-in-1 MagSafe charger for $70
items.summary:
Courtesy of the official Baseus storefront at Amazon, you can now score the brand’s 140W Qi2-certified 5-in-1 desktop charging station for $49.99 shipped once you enter promo code 784XB3Q7 during checkout. This is regularly an $88 charging unit, which drops by $38 with the promo code to land at the lowest price we have tracked for it to date. That’s a 43% discount, which lands it $20 below its previous all-time low. Alternatively, you can also score this with a 3-in-1 Qi2 15W 3-in-1 charging station for your everyday Apple kit by shelling out an additional $20 for the 140W desktop charger at $69.99 shipped. To cash in on this particular deal, simply head to the promotion page right here and add both the 140W unit and the 15W Qi2-certified 3-in-1 chargers from the “Qualifying” and “Benefit” sections to your cart and checkout. Either way, you’re looking at an incredible value for your money with some solid savings, so be sure to grab them while the offer lasts. Head below for more details.
